ddegp_utils
===========

.. py:module:: ddegp_utils


Functions
---------

.. autoapisummary::

   ddegp_utils.differences_by_dim_func
   ddegp_utils.deriv_map
   ddegp_utils.transform_der_indices
   ddegp_utils.rbf_kernel


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:function:: differences_by_dim_func(X1, X2, rays, n_order, index=-1)

   
   Compute dimension-wise pairwise differences between X1 and X2,
   including hypercomplex perturbations in the directions specified by `rays`.

   This optimized version pre-calculates the perturbation and uses a single
   efficient loop for subtraction, avoiding broadcasting issues with OTI arrays.

   :param X1:
   :type X1: ndarray of shape (n1, d)
   :param X2:
   :type X2: ndarray of shape (n2, d)
   :param rays:
   :type rays: ndarray of shape (d, n_rays)
   :param n_order:
   :type n_order: int
   :param index:
   :type index: list or int, optional

   :returns: **differences_by_dim**
   :rtype: list of ndarray















   ..
       !! processed by numpydoc !!

.. py:function:: deriv_map(nbases, order)

   
   Creates a mapping from (order, index_within_order) to a single
   flattened index for all derivative components.
















   ..
       !! processed by numpydoc !!

.. py:function:: transform_der_indices(der_indices, der_map)

   
   Transforms a list of user-facing derivative specifications into the
   internal (order, index) format and the final flattened index.
















   ..
       !! processed by numpydoc !!

.. py:function:: rbf_kernel(differences, length_scales, n_order, n_bases, kernel_func, der_indices, powers, index=-1)

   
   Assembles the full DD-GP covariance matrix using an efficient, pre-computed
   derivative array and block-wise matrix filling.

   :param (Parameters are the same as your original function:
   :param with n_bases added):

   :returns: **K** -- Full kernel matrix with function values and derivative blocks.
   :rtype: ndarray















   ..
       !! processed by numpydoc !!
